data.name: Lecherous Village
data.detailed_description:
Wolfpine一直是冒險者在進入變幻之地之前的最後一站——一個充滿怪物和寶藏的區域。現在，村莊已成廢墟，當地居民迫切需要你的幫助。

扮演琳恩，一個意外繼承了村莊地塊的年輕女子，並開始恢復其昔日輝煌的任務。


在程序生成的地圖上展開激動人心的冒險，戰鬥怪物並遇到各種事件！


為當前的冒險選擇最佳技能，並在動態自動回合制戰鬥中觀看它們的表現！


在Wolfpine休息時提升你的技能，解鎖新的戰鬥能力並發現強大的神器和武器。


在旅行中或在Wolfpine度過時光時遇到各種角色。他們中的一些人會想幫助你，而另一些人則對你的角色有更直接和淫蕩的意圖。


世界地圖上的每次冒險都是程序生成的，因此各不相同。失敗並非永久，只需返回、重組並再次嘗試。下次你在恢復Lecherous Village的任務中會更幸運。

data.short_description: Lecherous Village 是一款具有豐富故事和刺激邂逅的奇幻輕度roguelite自動戰鬥遊戲。踏上危險的旅程，恢復一個小村莊，在途中遇到冒險、戰鬥和大量性愛！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows® 10 / 11 64-bit
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 / Intel® Core™ i5-6400
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon™ RX 580 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows® 10 / 11 64-bit
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen™ 5 1400 / Intel® Core™ i5-6500
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon™ RX 580 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: Lecherous Village
data.detailed_description:
For a long time, the village of Wolfpine attracted all kinds of adventurers with the promise of treasure and glory. They stopped there to rest and restock before venturing further into the dangerous region full of magic and riches. However, recently, rumors appeared about these lands getting more dangerous, as if some long-forgotten evil awakened from its slumber and is now corrupting these lands.

You play as Lynn, an ambitious young woman drawn to Wolfpine by strange dreams. She finds the village in ruins and takes the important task of restoring it and finding what caused its ruin.

Wolfpine is your base for every adventure beyond the village. Journey past the gate to discover new places, meet strange creatures, and solve the mystery behind the attack on Wolfpine.

Every adventure brings you closer to your goal. Each restored house in the village unlocks new shops and upgrades, giving you more ways to delve deeper into the magical region. Upgrade your attributes, learn new abilities, and stock up on the best equipment and potions – then even harder enemies won’t be a problem on your quest.

Your strategy matters more than your clicking speed. Choose the best abilities for your style and watch the battle unfold automatically. Defeat is not permanent, as a powerful charm keeps you from dying and brings you back to Wolfpine. Upgrade your character, adjust your combat abilities, and try again.

Meet a rich cast of characters in Wolfpine and the nearby lands. Some will try to trick you or slow you down, while others will guide you and help you on your adventure. But one thing they all have in common is that they’re a bit lecherous.

data.short_description: Lecherous Village is an adult roguelite autobattler where you master new abilities, upgrade stats, and face strategic combat against enemy groups. Rebuild a fallen village – each run unlocks powerful upgrades, erotic encounters, and rich treasures as you uncover the village's secrets.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows® 10 / 11 64-bit
  • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 / Intel® Core™ i5-6400
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 580 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows® 10 / 11 64-bit
  • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 5 1400 / Intel® Core™ i5-6500
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 580 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
